activities_projects.title: Chapter Summary Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop the ability to summarize the story
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify the key events and achievements of the protagonist
Write a summary of the story in 8–10 sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and completeness of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the personality of the protagonist
steps: List the qualities that make the protagonist exceptional
Give examples from the chapter illustrating these qualities
Write 5–6 sentences describing the protagonist’s character
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Event Sequencing Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in the story
steps: List the important milestones or events mentioned in the chapter
Arrange them in chronological order
Write one sentence explaining each event

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
activities_projects.objective: Learn new words from the chapter
steps: Find 8 new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a meaningful sentence

activities_projects.title: Inspirational Quote Writing
activities_projects.objective: Understand the life lessons from the story
steps: Identify 2–3 important life lessons from the story
Write them in the form of inspirational quotes
Explain each quote in 1–2 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops moral understanding and expressive writing

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Writing
steps: Imagine a conversation between the protagonist and a friend
Write at least 6–8 lines of dialogue
Include discussion about challenges and achievements
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves creative writing and dialogue skills

activities_projects.title: Theme Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main theme of the chapter
steps: Think about the values highlighted in the story
Write the main theme in 3–4 sentences
Give examples from the chapter to support your theme
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of deeper meaning in literature
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play Activity
steps: Select a scene from the story
Act out the roles of the protagonist and another character
Practice the dialogue with classmates

activities_projects.title: Creative Illustration
steps: Draw a scene depicting the protagonist’s major achievement
Include details showing their determination and focus
Write a short description of the scene
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances creative expression and understanding of the story

activities_projects.title: Opinion Writing
activities_projects.objective: Express personal views about the story
steps: Write your opinion about the protagonist’s qualities
Explain whether you find them inspiring or relatable
Support your ideas with examples from the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops opinion writing and reasoning skills
